result.summary: E6 complete: pinned the test toolchain to the exact version matching the local browser cache, verified with a headless smoke run that no browser download was triggered, and seeded the deliverable repo with the pinned devDependency and a registry-fallback note.

E3 done end-to-end: built the ffmpeg cut pipeline (concat re-encode + drawtext overlay + faststart, silence injection for audio-less inputs) under the size budget, saved the parameterized cut-video.sh with env tunables, and verified the output with ffprobe.

D4 spike: demonstrated the static web build plus one-URL plugin preload end-to-end on the in-browser viewer, documented the URL-parameter activation constraint, and captured a thin fallback recipe in case the richer viewer slips.
